adminStatusVocab.description: The admin Orders dropdown only lets you set these 7 states. Grid-level 'Processing' is a READ-ONLY computed status (set automatically when payment is captured / via other internal triggers) and CANNOT be applied from the admin UI.
adminStatusVocab.discoveredFrom: Admin > Orders > [Order] > Status dropdown (verified on CO260320-00002 + CO260422-00007)

fixtureMapping.PROCESSING: UNAVAILABLE via admin UI; requires payment-capture event; not settable from status dropdown
fixtureMapping.READY_FOR_PICKUP: admin-status='Ready for pickup' (available but not used yet)

shipmentStatusVocab.description: Shipment sub-state dropdown. Note spelling 'Send' (not 'Sent'). No 'Delivered' option in admin UI.
shipmentStatusVocab.discoveredFrom: Admin > Orders > [Order] > Shipment blade > Status dropdown

fixtureMapping.DELIVERED: NO DEDICATED OPTION — use order-level 'Completed' instead, as the shipment sub-state does not have 'Delivered'

invoiceFeature.evidence: "Get invoice PDF" button is visible and non-disabled on CO260320-00002 Completed-order blade
invoiceFeature.note: Invoice generation is enabled store-wide for B2B-store. INVOICE_AVAILABLE_ORDER fixture is satisfied by any Completed order.

returnsFeature.evidence: "Create return" button is visible and non-disabled on CO260320-00002 Completed-order blade
returnsFeature.note: Returns/RMA feature is enabled. ORDER_WITH_RETURN fixture would require placing + submitting an RMA — not executed this session.

bopisLocations.note: Did not confirm pickup-type fulfillment centers. BOPIS_PICKUP_ORDER deferred.

seedActions: Admin > Orders > CO260320-00002 > Status dropdown > selected 'Completed' > Save
Admin > Orders > CO260320-00002 > Shipment SH260320-00003 > Status 'Send' + tracking 1Z999AA10123456784 > OK

SHIPPED_ORDER.expectedStorefrontLabel: Shipped (or Pending — confirm with storefront xAPI statusDisplayValue mapping)
seedActions: Admin > Orders > CO260321-00001 > Status dropdown > selected 'Pending' > Save
Admin > Orders > CO260321-00001 > Shipment SH260321-00001 > Status 'Send' + tracking 1Z999AA10123456784 > OK
SHIPPED_ORDER.caveat: The expected storefront label is 'Shipped' but admin does not have a dedicated 'Shipped' order-level status. We used 'Pending' so order is not fully Completed while shipment is out. If storefront xAPI does not map admin 'Pending' + shipment 'Send' to 'Shipped', these 4 cases remain BLOCKED until product-owner confirms the status mapping rules or a dedicated 'Shipped' admin status is added.

INVOICE_AVAILABLE_ORDER.note: Same order as COMPLETED_ORDER. Store-wide invoice feature is enabled, so any Completed order also serves as INVOICE_AVAILABLE_ORDER.

skipped.reason: The admin Orders > Status dropdown only exposes Cancelled/Completed/Custom/New/Payment required/Pending/Ready for pickup. 'Processing' is a READ-ONLY computed status set when payment is captured (verified on CO260422-00007 belonging to Elena — dropdown did NOT contain 'Processing' even though the grid displayed 'Processing'). Cannot be directly seeded from Admin SPA.
skipped.recommendation: Either (a) place a new order through storefront + complete CyberSource payment to trigger automatic 'Processing' status, or (b) confirm with product owner whether the 'Custom' status slot can be configured to display 'Processing', or (c) use a direct API call with the internal status string if the status field is an open string. Needs product-owner input.

skipped.reason: Requires splitting line items across 2 shipments. Existing Emily orders each have exactly 1 shipment. Creating a 2nd shipment and allocating line items to it was not attempted in this session — higher complexity than single-blade status toggle.
skipped.recommendation: Place a fresh order via storefront with 2+ line items, then use Admin > Orders > [Order] > Shipments section to Add document → create 2 shipments and move items between them. Or do it via Orders REST API.

skipped.reason: Requires placing a BOPIS order via the storefront (pickup option, not delivery). Not attempted: (1) did not verify that pickup-type fulfillment centers are configured, (2) pickup is a cart/checkout-time flow, not an admin-side toggle.
skipped.recommendation: (1) Verify via Admin > Inventory > Fulfillment Centers that at least one center has 'Pickup' or 'BOPIS' type. (2) Log in as Emily on the storefront, select a product, choose Pickup in cart, complete checkout. Then re-run this seed script to record the order number.

skipped.reason: Spec says 'Place order; then deactivate/remove that product from catalog'. Deactivating a shared catalog product (e.g. ALCE9277 'X2S Kids Camera' on CO260320-00002) would break ANY other regression suite that depends on that SKU. Too invasive for a shared QA environment.
skipped.recommendation: Create a DEDICATED fixture-only product (e.g. SKU 'FIXTURE-DISCONTINUED-001') that is never used by any other test, seed an order containing it, then deactivate. This needs catalog-seeding coordination — should be owned by qa-seed-data skill, not by this ad-hoc session.

skipped.reason: Same shared-catalog risk as ORDER_WITH_DISCONTINUED_ITEM — setting a real product's stock to 0 would affect other regression suites (e.g. catalog-browsing tests).
skipped.recommendation: Same as above — create a dedicated OOS fixture product and a dedicated order referencing it.

skipped.reason: Returns feature is enabled (confirmed), but creating an acknowledged return requires (a) submitting a return request from the storefront, (b) admin acknowledging via Admin > Orders > [Order] > Returns. Not executed this session due to time budget.
skipped.recommendation: After COMPLETED_ORDER exists, run storefront return submission flow for Emily, then Admin > Orders > CO260320-00002 > Create return > Save.

skipped.reason: Requires a completed order delivered 30+ days ago. CO260320-00002 was delivered/completed today (2026-04-22) — it is NOT past the return window. Creating a back-dated order requires direct DB manipulation or a time-machine option that was not investigated.
skipped.recommendation: Either temporarily lower the store return-window setting to 0 days then revert (destructive config change), or use an order from March 2026 (CO260320-00002 was completed today — but its 'Created at' is March 20, so if return-window is based on created-at rather than delivered-at, this may already qualify). Needs product-owner clarification on which date the return-window clock starts from.

skipped.reason: Quote fixtures not attempted in this session — Priority 9 in the plan, out of time budget. All 6 quote fixtures require the storefront RFQ → admin response → buyer accept flow.
skipped.recommendation: Delegate to a follow-on session focused on quotes. The admin-side vocabulary for quotes should be discovered before attempting (Admin > Quotes).

skipped.reason: Not attempted — depends on QUOTE_WITH_ADMIN_RESPONSE being seeded first.
Not attempted; depends on negotiation feature being enabled.
Not attempted; depends on substitution feature being enabled.

preserved.reason: qty=-1 bug evidence for BUG_028_036 — per instructions, do not modify

summary.recommendation: Run a follow-up seeding session for: (1) BOPIS flow via storefront (requires verifying pickup-center config first), (2) create dedicated fixture products for DISCONTINUED/OOS to avoid shared-catalog collateral damage, (3) quote flows in a dedicated session. For PROCESSING_ORDER, escalate to product owner: the admin UI does not expose 'Processing' as a settable status — a design/spec clarification is needed (is 'Processing' synonymous with 'Pending' for storefront display, or is it a distinct computed-only state?).

actionsLog.action: Logged in as admin/Password1! at https://vcst-qa.govirto.com
Navigated to Orders list; discovered grid shows admin statuses New/Payment required/Processing etc.
Filtered orders by 'emily'; found 5 Emily Johnson orders (3 New, 2 Payment required)
Opened CO260320-00002; discovered admin Status dropdown options: Cancelled, Completed, Custom, New, Payment required, Pending, Ready for pickup
Opened Shipment SH260320-00003; discovered shipment Status options: Cancelled, New, Pick & Pack, Ready to Send, Send
Set SH260320-00003 status to 'Send'; added tracking 1Z999AA10123456784; clicked OK
Clicked Save on order blade; verified persistence by reload — order=Completed, shipment=Send
Set SH260321-00001 shipment status to 'Send' + tracking 1Z999AA10123456784 > OK
Set CO260321-00001 order status to 'Pending' > Save
Verified persistence by reload — CO260321-00001: order=Pending, shipment=Send
Investigated PROCESSING status on CO260422-00007 (Elena, displays 'Processing' in grid); confirmed Processing is NOT in the admin dropdown — it is a read-only computed status
Confirmed invoice feature enabled via 'Get invoice PDF' button on CO260320-00002
Confirmed returns feature enabled via 'Create return' button on CO260320-00002
